claim_boundary: Real Hugging Face causal LM loaded through transformers; GPTQ/AWQ entries are local activation-aware proxy algorithms, not auto-gptq/awq library runs.
success_criteria: PASS_REAL_HF_LOSS_LOGIT_AND_WMSE if QA packet quantization beats the best GPTQ/AWQ-style proxy on eval loss, logit MSE, and weighted MSE for at least one bit width each.
